summary: Iteration 8 testing complete — backend balance math (3 user examples), backward-compat fallback, future-month clamp, fees PDF range, expenses PDF range, and PDF heading (no overlap) all verified. Frontend Reports/Finance/BatchDetail/StudentProfile testids and integration verified. 12/12 backend tests pass, all frontend critical checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Balance math implementation in server.py (compute_balance_up_to + _student_joining_month) is clean and matches the user's 3 examples to the rupee. Falls back to created_at month when joining_month is blank, and clamps negative spans to 0 via max(0,...) in months_between_inclusive.

report_fees_pdf maintains backward compat: passing legacy `month=` alone still works (s_m=e_m=month). Auto-swaps if s_m > e_m. Filename pattern matches spec: fees_{batch_id}_{start}_{end}.pdf and expenses_{start}_{end}.pdf.

PDF heading fix (Brand leading=26 spaceAfter=10, H2 leading=18 spaceAfter=6, Sub leading=14) produces visually separated lines in attendance/fees/expenses PDFs. Verified via pypdf extract_text() — brand and title each occupy distinct line and brand line never contains title text.

Frontend Reports.jsx correctly validates `feeStartMonth > feeEndMonth` and `expStartMonth > expEndMonth` with toast.warning('From month must be before To month') BEFORE any network call (no API request fired when range is invalid — verified via Playwright network capture).

Profile balance tile renders the exact expected value: for Example 1 student (joined 2026-04, paid 700+500+1500 across Apr/May/Jun) the tile reads 'Balance due ₹500 · Since 2026-04 · 3 mo active' on 2026-06 — wait, current view is 2026-06 default and balance is 500 (because viewing month defaults to current 2026-06 and the cumulative is 3000-2500=500). Matches backend exactly.
Minor: list_fees endpoint at server.py line 533 declares `month: str` as a required query param — that's by design (UI always passes current month). Confirmed not a regression.
Minor (non-blocking): pytest emits a class-scoped-fixture-as-instance-method deprecation warning for two fixtures; can be moved to @classmethod or module scope before pytest 10.

verified_examples.edge_missing_joining_month: Student created with no joining_month → row.joining_month resolved from created_at, months_active >= 1 — PASS
verified_examples.edge_future_joining_month: joining_month=2099-01, paid 700 in current month → months_active=0, expected_to_date=0, balance=-700 (advance) — PASS

verified_pdfs.fees_range: GET /api/reports/fees.pdf?start_month=2026-04&end_month=2026-06 → 200 application/pdf, filename fees_{id}_2026-04_2026-06.pdf, subtitle contains 'Period: 2026-04 to 2026-06', columns: # Student Joined Months Expected Paid Balance — PASS
verified_pdfs.expenses_range: GET /api/reports/expenses.pdf?start_month=2026-04&end_month=2026-06 → 200, sections per month + Grand Total section, filename expenses_2026-04_2026-06.pdf — PASS
verified_pdfs.heading_no_overlap: Attendance + Fees + Expenses PDFs all show 'EduManage' on its own line followed by the title on a distinct subsequent line; brand line never contains title text — PASS

verified_frontend.Reports_pickers: fee-report-start-month / fee-report-end-month / exp-report-start-month / exp-report-end-month — all present (count=1 each)
verified_frontend.Reports_validation: start_month > end_month for FEE report → no network request fired (validation blocks); toast.warning code path confirmed in Reports.jsx:402
verified_frontend.Reports_API_call: Valid range → GET /api/reports/fees.pdf?batch_id=...&start_month=2026-04&end_month=2026-06 captured in network
verified_frontend.Finance_balance_row: fee-balance-{student_id} testid renders on rows with non-zero balance
verified_frontend.AddStudent_modal: student-joining-month-input present, defaults to current month (2026-06 observed)
verified_frontend.StudentProfile_tile: profile-balance-tile shows 'Balance due ₹500 · Since 2026-04 · 3 mo active' for the seeded Example-1 student (matches backend)

seed_data_creation: Created isolated batches/students for the 3 user examples and edge cases. Batches named TEST_IT8_* (E1/E2/E3/NJM/FUT/PDF/HDR/HDRF). Each example uses fresh joining_month + payments. 3 TEST_IT8 expenses (Rent Apr 5000, Books May 1200, Misc Jun 800) — note: re-running the test suite will accumulate additional expense rows since there is no per-test cleanup. Recommend periodic cleanup of TEST_IT8_* documents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 ships per-student balance carry-forward + range-based PDFs + heading fix. All three user-given balance examples are validated end-to-end with isolated fixtures. The test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration8_balance_and_pdfs.py uses pypdf for PDF text extraction (now installed). If you re-run, note that the expenses PDF total in /reports/expenses.pdf may grow over time because TEST_IT8 expenses accumulate; assertions intentionally avoid hardcoded grand-total values. The Reports page has 3 Download buttons (attendance/fees/expenses) — when capturing requests with playwright, register listeners BEFORE the click and prefer per-card testids. No mocks anywhere — real backend, real DB.
